# debugDescription

**Instance Property**

A text representation of the activity-model parameters that’s suitable for output during debugging.

## Declaration

```swift
var debugDescription: String { get }
```

## Describing parameters

- **description**: A text representation of the activity-model parameters.
- **playgroundDescription**: A description of the activity-model parameters shown in a playground.
